rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal exemptions and has no relation to Educ. Code §33.021, which governs school library collection standards. No overlap exists.
quote: The Texas State Library and Archives Commission, in consultation with the State Board of Education, shall adopt voluntary standards for school library services
_note: No conflict: the proposed change addresses property tax homestead exemptions while the cited rule addresses school library standards; the two provisions operate in unrelated statutory domains.
